  • 20 Free Application Form Templates You Can Try Right Now

20 Free Application Form Templates You Can Try Right Now

Written by: Jamie Juviler

HUBSPOT'S FORMS SOFTWARE

Easily build and embed forms on your site to convert anonymous visitors into leads.

Try Now for Free

Updated: 01/12/24

We use web forms all the time, whether it’s making a purchase or an order, sending a message to an online business, or, the topic of this article, submitting an application.

Still, creating an effective form optimized for submissions can be deceptively challenging. Fortunately, you don’t need to build your forms from scratch. With the help of an online form builder and an application form template, you can start collecting responses in minutes.

That’s why, in this post, we’ve compiled 20 excellent web form examples, which you can adapt to your site’s needs. Whether you’re collecting job applications, scholarship applications, or blood donor applications, we have you covered.

Application Form Templates

In this list, we’ll share free form template examples from four online form tools:

  • Typeform
  • Jotform
  • Forms.app
  • Paperform

50 Free Coding Templates

Free code snippet templates for HTML, CSS, and JavaScript -- Plus access to GitHub.

  • Navigation Menus & Breadcrumbs Templates
  • Button Transition Templates
  • CSS Effects Templates
  • And more!
Learn more Get Your Free Templates

    Download Free

    All fields are required.

    Form not available

    You're all set!

    Click this link to access this resource at any time.

    Download Now

    Typeform Application Form Templates

    1. Job Application Form Template

    This clean, elegant form by Typeform guides job applicants through a series of questions to assess their skills, thinking, and reasons for applying. Besides being a well-designed template, the form also features copy that does a great job of maintaining a friendly tone.

    2. Rental Application Form Template

    Typeform also offers a sleek template for apartment rental applications, complete with conditional logic and a color scheme that matches the background image.

    3. Volunteer Application Form Template

    If you’re looking for volunteers for your organization or initiative, check out this simple but effective form template. Notable are the suggestions that appear in some fields, such as filling in your occupation.

    4. Recruitment Application Form Template

    This generic recruitment form is great for hiring roles in any organization. It includes unique multiple-choice/free response fields for a smooth experience, and a section to upload your resume.

    5. Admission Form Template

    On the other hand, if you’re taking admissions to any kind of program, this form template is worth a look. It gives applicants the chance to explain why they’d like to attend and lets them upload any relevant materials through the form.

    Jotform Application Form Templates

    6. Spa Client Intake Form

    The whole point of a spa is to put customers at ease, and a spa intake form should try to do the same. This form is easy to understand, contains all relevant questions you might need, and can be adapted for other business types too.

    7. Blood Donation Form

    This straightforward blood donation form is perfect for blood drives. It’s straightforward, comprehensive, and easy to understand, all crucial for any medical form.

    8. Bank Account Opening Form

    Before opening a new account at your bank, clients can complete this form that includes relevant personal information and security questions.

    9. Guest Speaker Form

    Any organization that plans and/or hosts events should have a guest speaker form readily available. Jotform has a template that you can easily adapt to your needs, but the basic questions are already included.

    10. Guest Post Writer Application Form

    For blogs that are open to publishing guest posts, it’s a good idea to have a guest post form on hand that you can quickly send in response to inquiries. This template includes basic questions and a space to upload one’s creative work.

    11. Online Rental Application Form

    Similar to Typeform, Jotform offers a simple rental application form that’s minimal and easily customizable.

    Forms.app Application Form Templates

    12. Job Application Form Template

    Forms.app offers visually engaging forms with full-screen background images and clear form fields. Take this job application form template, for example — it’s not too cluttered, and it’s fully customizable with drag-and-drop.

    13. Internship Application Form Template

    This is another simple form that’s designed for internships but can be adapted to any role in any program or organization.

    14. Gym Membership Form Template

    Complete with a motivating background image, this online gym membership form lets new members easily sign up for your facilities. New members can quickly complete the form and start their routines.

    15. Course Registration Form Template

    Forms.app also offers a user-friendly course registration template. Again, this one is fairly generic but can be customized for any online course, program, or certification.

    16. Freelance Application Form

    Looking to hire freelancers? Try this free template for accepting freelancer applications. Applicants can provide a personal statement, work history, and any materials to prove the quality of their work.

    Paperform Application Form Templates

    17. Basic Job Application Form Template

    We’ve seen several job application templates in this list so far — this one is probably the most stripped-back. If you want to stay away from anything fancy, this one's for you.

    18. Scholarship Application Form Template

    You may want to collect scholarship applications online, allowing for a larger pool of applicants and an overall easier process. With this template, it’s easy for applicants to submit their information, plus sign off with an electronic signature.

    19. Pet Adoption Application Form Template

    This pet adoption form template spreads its questions over multiple pages, making visitors more likely to complete the form. It also validates responses and includes photos of adorable animals, both of which are key.

    20. Vendor Application Form Template

    When communicating with and keeping track of vendors, you want a form that they actually want to complete. Like the previous example, this template does a great job in breaking up this longer form into manageable sections. Take this multi-page template as is, or adapt it for your business needs.

    Build application forms, fast.

    An application form probably isn’t the flashiest thing your website has to offer. Still, if you want visitors to fill them out, it never hurts to craft one that looks good and gets users to the “submit” button more quickly.

    And with these code-free form tools and templates, you can build an effective application form in much less time than you might think. You might even want send in an application yourself!

     
    Topics:

    Forms
